subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath arrived and brought joy and gladness. Concerning the tribulations that have befallen thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و سبب سرور و حبور گردید از بلایای وارده بر شما
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @praise and encouragement
